description: Named escaped-defect regression pack — Phase 1. One entry per known escaped defect class.

ggt_alias_miss.description: GGT alias miss — runtime key with misspelling (glutamil vs glutamyl) failed to resolve to canonical 'ggt'.

bilirubin_canonical_mismatch.description: Bilirubin venous alias 'bilirubin_total_(venous)' resolved to 'total_bilirubin' instead of canonical 'bilirubin'.

slug_leakage.description: Internal identifiers (ph_*_v*, snake_case slugs, backend strings) appearing in customer-facing results surfaces.

wave1_contradiction.description: Wave 1 domain card band_label vs consequence_sentence_head must not contradict (stable/optimal vs emergency wording; elevated bands vs falsely reassuring copy). Guarded via LC-S5 proving fingerprints.
wave1_contradiction.note: Promoted LC-S5 — CHECK 5 binary assertions on latest_fingerprints.json; replaces Phase-1 status placeholder.

persisted_result_replay.description: Stale persisted result loaded into current frontend fails to render or renders with schema mismatch.
persisted_result_replay.note: Promoted LC-S20/22 — persisted replay fixture + compatibility contract replaces Phase-1 placeholder.

narrative_compiler_why_surface.description: Layer B WHY signals compile but deterministic narrative compiler (Layer C mock path) fails to emit lead/secondary consumer-visible prose for homocysteine leaf or LDL canonical lane.
narrative_compiler_why_surface.note: Promoted post-LC-S1 from unit narrative compiler tests — Sentinel + baseline parity.

questionnaire_exercise_unknown.description: Questionnaire exercise absence coerced to zero minutes at mapper bridge — no questionnaire answer must resolve to unknown, not zero exercise.
questionnaire_exercise_unknown.note: Promoted post-LC-OBS-2 from unit orchestrator bridge tests — baseline parity + statin invariants.

narrative_payload_assembly.description: NarrativePayloadV1-primary Layer C assembly path (LC-S3) — five sections unpopulated, prohibited claims emitted, prescriptive language in next-steps, or backwards-compat regression when payload absent.
narrative_payload_assembly.note: Promoted post-LC-S3 — guards payload-primary assembly path not covered by legacy narrative_compiler_why_surface guard.

statin_signal_isolation.description: Statin medication annotation changes consumer wording only — signal states, rankings, top findings order, and domain band labels must be identical between statin-on and statin-off runs on the same panel.
statin_signal_isolation.note: Promoted post-LC-S4 from unit statin context integration test test_s6 — guards formatter-level isolation of consumer wording from analytical scoring.

biomarker_value_reference_unit_incoheren.description: LC-S8 — biomarker numeric value unit vs lab reference range unit must be convertible (registry) or identical before scoring; hemoglobin g/L, hematocrit L/L, and one-sided refs normalise deterministically; incompatible pairs yield unit_reference_range_incoherent.

frontend_section_not_backed_by_governed_.description: LC-S16 — visible results section cannot be traced to a stable DTO field or governed asset path.

knowledge_asset_not_surfaced_when_availa.description: LC-S16 — governed Knowledge Bus or IDL asset available at runtime but not reachable through the frontend consumer contract.
knowledge_asset_not_surfaced_when_availa.note: Baseline guard via AB homocysteine governed WHY presence; full surfacing matrix deferred to LC-S18.

generic_fallback_used_when_governed_asse.description: LC-S16 — generic hero/body fallback copy used when governed narrative or IDL fields are present on the same payload.
generic_fallback_used_when_governed_asse.note: Documented in LC-S16 audit; deterministic split-brain guard deferred — covered partially by narrative_compiler_why_surface.

consumer_payload_internal_field_leakage.description: LC-S19 — internal governance strings, sprint ids, or raw signal_ids appear in consumer-facing DTO text fields.

dto_frontend_contract_breakage.description: LC-S19 — build_analysis_result_dto root keys drift from frontend AnalysisResult contract.

raw_signal_or_internal_id_visible.description: LC-S16/19 — raw signal_* ids visible in consumer domain score sentences or retail narrative fields.

kb_lifecycle_required_file_missing.description: LC-S17 — Knowledge Bus package missing required files for its lifecycle tier (standard three-file floor or WHY-enabled PSI).

kb_orphan_package_unreported.description: LC-S17 — package directories on disk diverge from governance inventory without structured orphan reporting.
kb_orphan_package_unreported.note: Reporter flags drift; inventory refresh backlog documented in LC-S17 §13.

root_cause_target_not_loaded.description: LC-S18 — registered root-cause target fails to load governed hypothesis asset at registry validation.

why_asset_silent_skip.description: LC-S18 — registered target removed or skipped without loud validation failure.

metadata_malformed_not_failed.description: LC-S18 — malformed root-cause registry metadata does not raise RootCauseRegistryValidationError.

why_output_changed_after_registration_mi.description: LC-S18 — hypothesis asset fingerprint drift between before/after registration migration.

new_why_asset_requires_backend_code.description: LC-S18 — adding a WHY-enabled target still requires bespoke compiler table edits instead of validated registry spec.
new_why_asset_requires_backend_code.note: Hybrid manual_v1 registry — future metadata-only path deferred; adding a target requires one RootCauseTargetSpec row plus loader/asset, not compiler loop edits.

orphan_why_asset_auto_loaded.description: LC-S18 — orphan KB package auto-discovered into root-cause registration without inventory validation.

duplicate_why_target_id_not_rejected.description: LC-S18 — duplicate root-cause target signal_id accepted without validation error.

orchestrator_phase_output_changed.description: LC-S21 — behaviour-preserving orchestrator phase extraction changed AB baseline analytical output fingerprint.

pipeline_phase_regression.description: LC-S21 — named pipeline phase helpers or documented phase order regressed.

scaffold_documentation_missing_for_new_p.description: LC-S23 — required scaffold architecture or developer guide documents missing required headings.

active_signal_biomarker_missing_ssot_met.description: LC-S23B — Tier 1 active signal biomarkers missing populated SSOT metadata fields.

ssot_metadata_unreviewed_for_kb_wave_tar.description: LC-S23B — Tier 1 SSOT metadata contains prohibited placeholder strings or invalid empty values.

kb_package_estate_inventory_stale.description: LC-S18A — package directories on disk are not registered in the governance estate inventory.

kb_orphan_package_unreviewed.description: LC-S18A — post-KB-S49 packages registered in inventory without review approval must not be runtime-valid.

kb_inventory_entry_missing_on_disk.description: LC-S18A — governance inventory lists a package directory that does not exist on disk.

kb_draft_package_marked_runtime_valid.description: LC-S18A — review-queue package marked runtime-loaded or validator-ready without approval.

kb_why_enabled_package_missing_required_.description: LC-S18A — WHY-enabled inventory package missing required PSI or standard lifecycle files.

consumer_prose_internal_compiler_leakage.description: FE-R1 — internal compiler tokens (governed label, ranked lead pattern, lab anchor, functional read headers) visible on retail narrative/IDL surfaces.

consumer_prose_unbounded_kb_dump.description: FE-R1 — lead/secondary narrative exceeds consumer bounds or dumps raw KB mechanism/hypothesis blocks.

consumer_retail_label_template_suffix.description: FE-R1 — IDL retail_display_label still uses ': is outside the optimal range on this panel' template suffix.

consumer_confidence_raw_numeric_leakage.description: FE-R1 — runner-up/confidence consumer lines expose raw numeric confidence comparisons (e.g. 0.90 vs 0.90).

consumer_balanced_systems_empty_when_dom.description: FE-R1 — balanced_systems_v1 null/empty while multiple consumer domain scores are stable (>=80).

consumer_biomarker_status_direction_mism.description: FE-R1 — direction-aware biomarkers (e.g. ALP low at lab floor) labelled critical on retail biomarker rows.

consumer_prose_raw_signal_id_visible.description: FE-R1 — raw internal signal slug phrases (Lh High, Alp Low, Hypercortisolism, suboptimal-on slugs) visible on consumer prose surfaces.

consumer_summary_compiler_self_descripti.description: FE-R1 — narrative_report_v1.retail_summary contains compiler self-description (ranked lead pattern, lab anchor, thread language, internal safety commentary).

retail_page_duplicate_prose_block.description: FE-R1 — the same substantial prose block repeated across retail_summary, IDL pattern cards, hero primary concern, or domain contributor sentences.

retail_results_journey_wrong_order.description: FE-R2 — results page retail journey sections appear out of v6 Phase 1 order.

body_overview_not_first.description: FE-R2 — body overview section is not first in the retail results journey.

working_well_section_missing_or_late.description: FE-R2 — what's working well appears after primary finding or is missing from retail journey.

biomarker_evidence_hidden_in_advanced_on.description: FE-R2 — BiomarkerDials only inside advanced/clinician disclosure, not main retail journey.

clinician_language_in_retail_flow.description: FE-R2 — clinician-structured or clinician-only headings appear in retail journey flow.

results_page_accordion_dominated.description: FE-R2 — main retail journey dominated by open accordions instead of linear sections.

duplicate_what_this_means_heading.description: FE-R2 — duplicate or accordion-level 'What this means' heading in retail flow.

biomarker_contribution_context_not_surfa.description: FE-R3 — contribution_context factual_statement not surfaced in biomarker expansion when present.

biomarker_educational_explainer_not_surf.description: FE-R3 — biomarker_educational_explainer not shown in expansion as general education.

biomarker_expansion_placeholder_visible.description: FE-R3 — placeholder filler copy shown when governed biomarker depth fields are absent.

biomarker_display_unit_regression.description: FE-R3 — display_value/display_unit/display_label fidelity regressed or frontend conversion added.

action_rationale_missing_when_available.description: FE-R3 — confirmatory test rationale not renderable in next-steps journey when DTO provides it.

next_steps_duplicate_visible.description: FE-R3 — duplicate next-step or confirmatory content visible across journey sections.

frontend_clinical_inference_added.description: FE-R3 — frontend adds clinical inference or mis-labels education as personalised interpretation.

fe_r2_journey_order_regressed.description: FE-R3 — FE-R2 Phase 1 retail journey section order regressed.

patterns_section_missing_when_idl_safe.description: FE-R5A — retail journey omits IDL pattern wiring when governed pattern surface is expected.

patterns_section_wrong_journey_position.description: FE-R5A — patterns section not between uncertainty and marker evidence in retail journey.

raw_cluster_name_used_as_pattern_label.description: FE-R5A — cluster names or unsafe labels used as consumer pattern card titles.

unsafe_pattern_taxonomy_visible.description: FE-R5A — raw scientific_class enum or internal taxonomy strings shown to consumers.

patterns_section_placeholder_visible.description: FE-R5A — placeholder copy shown when no safe IDL pattern records exist.

fe_r3_marker_evidence_regressed.description: FE-R5A — biomarker evidence removed from main retail journey or hidden in advanced only.
